verdict: Phase 0B boundary matrix is generated and clean; package extraction remains blocked only by the listed target blockers.

candidates.description: Actor primitives that are UI-free, scene-free, update-scheduler-free, and window-focus-free.
Actor input and gizmo-core adapter candidates.
Wallpaper app bootstrap and composition layer.
Concrete editor features and editor presentation components.
Generic window, tab, dock, menu, and app shell UI candidates.

debt.description: App-local attachment/runtime placement that still blocks actor-input and state/runtime extraction.
Wallpaper app composition still knows concrete editor/runtime policy details.
Transitional app runtime context and registration ports.
Runtime-like world/camera/object code still owned by editor/app folders.
Mixed scene/editor/ui state runtime that must split before runtime extraction.

debt.blocker: Actor-core and actor-input no longer own app-local update scheduling or focus services. Remaining binding debt is package placement for update-runtime and staged state observer binding ownership.
debt.deletionCondition: Update runtime and state observer binding are expressed through package-owned ports outside app-local glue.

debt.blocker: App composition still wires concrete scene/debug/hierarchy/inspector policy and workspace mode presentation behavior.
debt.deletionCondition: App composition imports public runtime/editor/UI installers and bootstrap ports only.

debt.blocker: AppRuntimeContext and runtime/ports are transitional glue that still define feature actor and registry contracts.
debt.deletionCondition: Reusable ports move to the package that owns the contract; wallpaper app becomes thin composition.

debt.blocker: scene-runtime mixes runtime state, editor state, UI layout state, scheduler, and observer facts.
debt.deletionCondition: runtime-state, editor-state, and ui-layout-state become separate facts with explicit adapters.

debt.blocker: Tesseract, Camera3, Scene render host, and Three/WebGL ownership are still partly app/editor feature owned.
debt.deletionCondition: Runtime worlds/cameras/projections expose command/query/frame-source ports consumed by editor Scene views.

runtime.blocker: Camera3 model directly owns Three camera/vector objects instead of a runtime camera port plus renderer backend.
runtime.deletionCondition: Camera model exposes renderer-agnostic camera state; Three camera realization moves to runtime-three backend.

runtime.blocker: Camera3 motion implements app-local RuntimeObject and is still scheduled by the app scene runtime.
runtime.deletionCondition: Camera motion consumes package-owned runtime frame and command ports, not app scene runtime services.

runtime.blocker: Scene View still binds runtime render output, editor window lifecycle, DOM host, and current renderable projection.
runtime.deletionCondition: Runtime exposes frame sources; editor Scene View consumes them through an editor host without owning runtime resources.

runtime.blocker: Tesseract4 runtime object owns 4D world update, Three line adapter, app-local UpdateFrame scheduling, and actor component creation path together.
runtime.deletionCondition: 4D world/projection update is runtime-core; Three renderable adapter is runtime-three; actor/editor binding is an adapter.

appComposition.blocker: App composition still wires Scene/Debug/Hierarchy/Inspector state, actor ids, default views, floating policies, hierarchy metadata, and debug log sink policy.
appComposition.deletionCondition: App composition imports runtime/editor/UI installers and connects only bootstrap ports, stores, shell, and render loop.

appComposition.blocker: App-local component definition installation still wires product feature adapters and editor/runtime integration components.
appComposition.deletionCondition: Product features own their package installers and wallpaper app composes package-level installer functions only.

appComposition.blocker: Workspace mode presentation controller lives in app composition and coordinates editor/window presentation state.
appComposition.deletionCondition: Workspace mode becomes editor/UI state coordination behind explicit ports.
